description_long: This is a sleek, futuristic airplane with a sharply pointed nose and a faceted, angular fuselage finished in glossy black. The wings are mid-mounted and swept back, with large, prominent propellers mounted on each side, suggesting a hybrid or advanced propulsion system. The tail features a distinctive twin vertical stabilizer configuration, adding to its aggressive, stealth-inspired appearance. The cockpit is smoothly integrated into the forward section of the fuselage, with a dark, streamlined canopy that appears to be enclosed. The rear of the airplane displays three visible engine exhausts, emitting a faint glow, hinting at high-performance capabilities. The overall design is compact and aerodynamic, with minimal surface protrusions and a high-tech, tactical aesthetic.
description: A glossy black, angular airplane with swept mid-mounted wings, twin vertical stabilizers, and large side propellers. The design is compact, futuristic, and highly aerodynamic.
description_view_0: Side view showing the swept mid-mounted wings, large side propeller, and twin vertical stabilizers at the rear.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the pointed nose, symmetrical wing and propeller arrangement, and the narrow, streamlined fuselage.
description_view_2: Opposite side view revealing the other propeller, wing structure, and the glowing engine exhausts at the rear.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the three engine exhausts, twin vertical stabilizers, and the full span of the propellers.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing configuration with swept wings and no visible winglets; wings are straight with a slight dihedral angle.
attribute_engine_type: Twin large propeller engines mounted on each wing, with three visible rear exhausts suggesting additional jet or hybrid propulsion.
attribute_tail_design: Twin vertical stabilizer tail configuration with a conventional horizontal stabilizer.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Retractable tricycle landing gear, with main gear under the wings and a nose gear (partially visible).
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with a single dark canopy integrated into the fuselage.
